title: Job Opening Teacher at American Institute

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at American Institute
jsonLd.description:
Join the American Institute family as a Teacher in Mysuru. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About American Institute:
American Institute is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with American Institute!
